column1: 1 San Francisco-San Jose were combined for the circuity analysis
2 Los Angeles-Inland Empire and Baltimore-Washington used the same average commute distance, as they were grouped together in the NHTS data
3 Circuitry is from a sample of OD points with network distance matched to average commute distance
Network Speed (congested), Network Speed (freeflow), Population: TTI complete data 1982-2007 (calculated from 2007 values only)
Circuity: Networks are Census Tiger 2008 county-level shapefiles merged together, commute distances are from 2009 NHTS
Employment: 2008 MSA Business Patterns (NAICS - from Censtats)
Speeds - 2010 Urban Mobility Report, Exhibit A-8. Composite Freeway and Arterial (25% Freeway, 75% Arterial), converted to km/h
CORRECTED LOS ANGELES AND SAN FRANCISCO AND GRAND RAPIDS 2.22.2013
